title: Teaching becomes a profession which requires huge sacrifices, when it comes to
problem_definition: Teaching becomes a profession which requires huge sacrifices, when it comes to a teacher's health. In this era, with an increase in the level of air pollution, it becomes difficult for teachers to cope up with chalk dust produced while writing on boards and teaching students. Also, some senior teachers are a prey of respiratory diseases and to top it all it deteroirates the decent look of teachers, when the chalk powder falls on teachers blazers and sarees. Henceforth it was many issues
problem_description: While teaching students in classrooms, it becomes quite problematic for teachers when they write on Green boards and chalk particles fall on their clothes. Also, it deteroirates the health of teachers who are preys of respiratory problems. Henceforth the profession of teaching puts them into difficult situations.
target_user_group: The 'user' group will be basically Teachers and foremost students for an interactive session in classroom.
problem_urgency: The problem is critical and needs an urgent solution as 'Health is Wealth'. Already the pandemic period has hampered our lifestyle to an extreme extent and the immunity level of people has lowered. Henceforth we have to be a part of the solution for a safer tomorrow. As influenza, breathing issues, coughing and sneezing are already alarming symptoms. Henceforth, being a student it is my duty, to take care of my mentors.
solution: The solution probably can be the construction of a "Two in One Duster". It will comprise of a wider body, adhering to the size limit so that the chalk powder collected by the cloth of the duster is stored inside it's machinery wherein it will be processed and furthermore it will be  converted into new chalks . It will comprise of different sections for collection storage, and production.
solution_benefits:
The reduces pain in the following ways :-
1. It will help teachers suffering from respiratory diseases in coping up with the help of "Two in One Duster". As the chalk dust will be directly stored in the storage tank and henceforth processed for it's conversion into brand new chalks. 
 
2. The appreance won't be affected. At times, teachers have to clean the sleeves of their blazers with handkerchiefs before meetings, as chalk dust makes their clothes dirty and adds disgrace to their personality

3. It will help teachers and students by giving them a new experience.
why_best_equipped: It's my pleasure and duty indeed! I have to look forward and take care of my teachers as they are my well-wishers. Also, I can't let their efforts go into vain as they are the ones who prepare us for our future. We have to understand their problem as it becomes a great issue in terms of healthcare too, and helping them in fighting with this issue will surely make them proud and enhance our learning too!

title: Online education is such a type of platform, where one cannot work properly if
problem_definition:
Online education is such a type of platform, where one cannot work properly if they do not have proper information about the way of learning. But, sometimes working with this platform brings some problems and drawbacks that need to be solved. 
Usually, when students face any kind of issues with the online way of learning, they panic up and end up missing their syllabus which can be harmful for their future. If they miss their studies, this can affect their job opportunities in the future. Students are the future of the world and should have access to education. 
No problem should stop them or come in their way of education. During these hard times, Survival is our main aim. But the need for education has kept the schools working in the form of online education. That is why, students should have no problems with the online way of studying. We have an aim and vision of ending these problems forever.
problem_description:
The problems that we thought are many in number. Students worldwide face many type of issues that need to be solved. Online education comes with its own advantages and disadvantages. 
But people don’t pay much attention to these problems and students continue facing these issues. And not only students, but teachers also face issues with the online platform which comes in their way of teaching. If there will be no teachers, then how will the students study?  That is why we thought of solving both the problems, of teachers and of students.
target_user_group:
The user group that we thought are suffering the most from the online way of education is students. Working professionals and college students can manage to solve their problems by themselves but students cannot   do so. They do not have much experience in the online field and are new to this system of learning. That is why the students face most of the problems.
As students are minor, they do not know what to do in the time of a problem and end up panicking. Thus, this results in their overall lacking in studies .That is why we thought of solving the problems of students.
problem_urgency:
As we all know, the world we are living in now has many restrictions due to the virus that has gained control over the world and our lives. But education and studying should continue under any circumstances. This is done through the online classes. 
But the problems that are faced in the online platform stop students from studying and act as an interruption in their way of learning. That is why, the problems that are faced in online studying are critical and need an urgent solution.
solution:
We have thought of a creative way of solving the problems. Rather than just working on finding the solution of one or two problems, we thought of creating such a platform where we could provide the students the solution of all their problems. 
That is why, we thought of creating a website where a student can select his/her problem and find the solution for it. This would be better and more efficient way of solving the problems as internet is the only way of learning these days, and students can use the same to find the solutions for their problems. In our website, we have included a “Describe your issue” tab in the menu where the student can go through the list of problems and find his/her specific problem. 
We have even added a comment section there, which a place where a student can enter his or her other problems, if they are not listed in the problems list. We have other tabs too, like an “About us tab”, where the students can know more about us and can even learn the way to create a website by following the video we have provided there. Our website is a working prototype, and we will further continue developing it.
This is the link of our website:-
. http://thenewthinkers.unaux.com/?i=1 
If this link doesn’t work, then just type-thenewthinkers.unaux.com on chrome
solution_benefits:
Our website, which is a fully functioning and working prototype, basically acts a platform where students can find the solution, and if their problems are not listed, can enter the problems in the comment section. The students can get solutions of their problems, anytime and anywhere. Now, through this website, the students can freely ask their problems and get solutions for it.
If the students have any other concerns, they can even contact us through the information in the “Contact us” tab. Our website contains some of the most common problems that are faced by students all over the world, and it also contains some specific problems that can be solved by just following the listed methods. So, this website acts as an overall problem solver.
why_best_equipped:
I think that I am the best equipped to offer this solution because, first things first, I am a student. I know the problems faced by the students and can thus provide the solutions for it. And we selected the Idea of creating a website because, I Aaryan have some expertise in coding and website development. 
I have been creating games and websites since the last 2 years. That is why I thought of using this Competition as an opportunity to showcase my skill and also solve the problems of my fellow students worldwide. I am also an editor. So, through my knowledge of editing, I can create some video tutorials also which will help students to learn the procedure of making a website. 
Through my knowledge of developing websites, I can continue modifying this website and add more problems and solutions to it. This will expand the choice of problems that the students can choose, and they will be able to get the solution for each and every problem they face. My teammate Khushi Agarwal is also very creative, and has contributed in giving the solution of some problems too. That is why I think, we are the best equipped to offer this solution.

title: The prospect of having an entire institution experience compacted into a
problem_definition:
The prospect of having an entire institution experience compacted into a personal electronic device is unusual, to say the least. It can be unnerving for students who have only ever known traditional classroom settings.
The lack of focus on skill-based learning, practical knowledge, competitions, co-curriculars is a concern of students around the globe. In many cases, students find it difficult to manage their time with online learning. Online learning is completely new for them and requires intensive work. They need a scheduled planner to manage their time in an effective manner. 
A common issue faced by both students and teachers is that the classes are not as interactive and efficacious as compared to offline education. The lack of platforms to hold competitions is a major issue faced by institutions.
 So, making the online education system and the current learning mediums more efficient and easier to use is the need of the hour.
problem_description: We aim to solve the major pain-points of students as well as teachers. Due to the shift from offline education to online, the focus on co-curriculars, competitions, and practical knowledge have decreased drastically. There is no efficient way of holding competitions, co-curricular activities, and webinars. By conducting various empathy and persona maps, we found out that one of the major concerns of both students and teachers is that classes are not as interactive as they once were. So, due to the lack of personal touch, the classes tend to become monotonous and lead to a lack of focus and sincerity among students.
target_user_group: Our intended users are teachers as well as students (grade 5 and above). After thorough research and conducting numerous surveys, we concluded that people living in urban and sub-urban areas are most likely to benefit from our solution. We have taken teachers and students belonging to families with a socio-economic background of the lower middle class and above as our target audience as they have access to the suitable technology and resources to get the best results from our website.
problem_urgency: Due to the ongoing pandemic, the education of students has suffered a lot. To properly understand the concepts, practical knowledge is crucial. Maintaining a proper balance between co-curriculars and academics is necessary for students, so the lack of skill-based learning and extracurriculars in online classes is a big issue. Along with this, there is no platform available with the proper qualifications to conduct competitions and events systematically. Being students ourselves, we understand the critical nature of these problems and believe that it should be our top priority to help address them.
solution:
We provide our users with a platform to explore their creative abilities and enhance their knowledge by giving them a space to hold competitions, webinars, and courses with professionals in their fields to put them in a productive mindset.  
We also aim to make the online education system a bit easier to navigate by helping teachers hold interactive classes and promote a sincere approach for students by allowing them to conduct quizzes and providing them with various features to keep a check on the students.
Our main focus is to inculcate the best aspects of offline education with online, which includes maintaining a healthy balance between co-curriculars and academics.
solution_benefits: Our website- 'EduCity' gives solutions to the problems discussed above and helps make education easier during the ongoing pandemic. We present our users with various resources that focus on practical knowledge and skill-based learning. It provides an efficient platform to hold competitions, meetings, and webinars. We also offer several professional courses to help students explore their talents and interests. Our platform also allows teachers to conduct classes and quizzes more efficiently and interactively and keep an eye on the decorum in classes. Through our solution, we aim to reduce some of the problems faced by users and make online education more fun and effective.
why_best_equipped:
We conducted thorough research followed by empathy and persona maps and came up with the solution to help our users. 
We believe that people will be attracted by our website as it is easy to work with and combines many features that are essential for efficiently conducting online classes. It gives a platform to hold competitions systematically and effectively, which is the need of the hour. Along with that, it also provides resources regarding various courses and co-curricular, that help the user enhance their skills and knowledge. We included a feedback form after each webinar to understand our users and their needs which will also help us make our platform user-friendly.
Through our website, we strive to reduce some of the problems faced by users and make online education more fun and productive!

title: Concisely, the problem is the inability of pupils, students or every other
problem_definition: Concisely, the problem is the inability of pupils, students or every other person to learn, expand, delve into or complete the knowledge they are interested in, in the time, the place and the way that are most convenient for them and in a wide range of subjects.
problem_description: As students we’ve encountered many occasions in which either we or our friends have missed, or haven’t understood major parts of the lessons or material that was taught in school. We’ve seen that the completion of material is almost impossible apart from the help of classmates or tutors, which requires financial resources and time. In addition, even when we wanted to expand our knowledge of a particular subject we had to search for the information in different platforms and not always the explanations were accurate or understandable. We’ve also discovered that there is no platform or app that allows us, pupils, students and so on, from all over the world, to receive filmed lessons (neither live broadcasts nor rebroadcasts) in an accessible way, in our language and in where we live.
target_user_group: Apparently, the problem we are attempting to solve touches each and every one who has desire to acquire new knowledge, expand existent knowledge, or share instructional information with people all around the world.
problem_urgency:
Education and learning are the basis for social and personal development. Providing access to diverse and available study material brings lots of advantages, for example:
-Raising the educational level and reducing gaps.
-Encouraging people to learn while creating interest in innovative and tailored material and teaching methods.
-Independence in the pace of the teacher who teaches you, and the ability to progress at the pace that the student chooses with the constant availability of the material in the app.
In an age where the degree of success of people is measured by their extent of knowledge it is important to have a place where everything can be learned regardless of the school or profession they have chosen to pursue in life, thus being able to be exposed to new discipline they were not familiar with.
solution:
The ability to provide accessibility of instructional information via available videos and live broadcasts brings the following advantages:
-Responses and detailed explanations receiving from the videos uploaders.
-An ability of advance that suits you the most.
-One place whereby every user can find what he's searching for easily and without limitations.
-Completion of material that you missed without any other way to do so.
-New matters exposure.
-Enjoyable learning experience.
-An ability to delve into a certain subject more than you could do elsewhere.
-Free and unrestricted choice of teachers and videos that you like out of wide variety.
-An ability to learn everywhere and every time.
-Every language videos and live broadcasts access.
-Free solutions for people who cannot afford a tutor.
- An ability of watching rebroadcasts.
-Learning gaps reduction between students all over the world.
-An ability of asking questions and getting answers from the teacher in the course of live broadcasts, and even after.
solution_benefits: The app enables the teaching and learning of an endless assortment of topics by watching free videos and live streams. Thus, with the help of which the users will be able to learn any profession they’ll choose to, in the time, the place and the pace that suit them the most.
why_best_equipped:
We think we’re the best equipped to offer this solution due to several reasons.
First of all, to us students, especially during the Corona period, it happend not once that we couldn’t go to school, haven’t understood the teaching material through the small Zoom screen, and even when we wanted to complete it, we haven’t had so many ways except for asking friends. And thus, after almost a year of experience with our own hands, we felt that that is the right time to suggest this idea and start making change. Secondly, we’re a pair of kids who come from a project called Unistream whereby we learn about entrepreneurship, the steps of developing a project, and even during three years of studying and work developing one by ourselves. I am (Ido) studying for two years already robotics. The profession contains the studyings of mechanics, electronics and logic, and I’m using an Arduino controller. And I’m (Rom), nowadays it’s the third year, studying computer science and specialise in several programming languages.

title:
Several of the present issues of education are:
the inability to differentiate
problem_definition:
Several of the present issues of education are:
the inability to differentiate between Educated and literate 
The practice of rote learning instead of practical based knowledge 
Government funding for education. 
Disciplinary policies
Technology in education
Charter schools and voucher programs
Common Core
Standardized testing
problem_description:
The economic growth of the country not only depends on natural resources, technology, and capital but mainly on the quantity and quality of manpower.
By quality of manpower, we mean the efficiency and productivity of work force.
The efficiency of the manpower depends on many important factors like health and nutrition, education and training, housing facilities, safe drinking water and sanitation.
These are considered as important determinants of quality of life. Adequate investment in these fields will increase the productivity and efficiency of the manpower. Economists call it ‘human capital formation’. By human capital we mean “the body of knowledge attained by the population and capacity of the population to use the knowledge effectively”.
Education is the most important component out of various components of social infrastructure. The well-educated and properly trained manpower can accelerate the pace of economic development.
Problems of Education:
Despite our best efforts, our educational development remains at a low level.
target_user_group: The User group whose problem I am referring to is our future generation which are in a verge of development and yet they are being backed by the bars of theoretical knowledge , or if not this then they are not allowed to pursue what they what at an early age resulting in  immense disinterest and a feeling of burden while referring to education .
problem_urgency:
It is essential to educate the public through education programs, advertising campaigns (to raise awareness) and other methods in a strategic and in-depth way so everyone can understand the importance of a 'circular', sustainable economy.
Over time, by addressing these issues, we can change how people perceive value (especially in the younger generations) so they can learn to limit their consumption and waste as well as how to reuse.
Education is the cornerstone for development- a society lacking a proper education system eventually leads to the failure of the society. Therefore, a strong and progressive education system is a necessity for a nation’s holistic growth.
solution:
These are some of the plans adopted to build such an education system:
I.            A curriculum reform:  The reform aims to adapt the curriculum to the new needs for skills and competences, strengthen the inter-disciplinary approach and provide educators with digital resources.
II.            Codes for quality education: These are the important codes and quality criteria that schools must raise the level of education by a minimum optimum level
III.            Subsidies in education: The city’s education sector will be built upon the concept of low-fee and subsidized schooling. Fees will be controlled by the governing bodies to ensure quality education to all.
IV.            Incorporation of technology and schooling: Digital systems, AI, internet-oriented technologies will be used to make the process of learning readily accessible.

        The young population is important for the future of a country. The priority in an educated city is to make students independent, confident, and rational human beings. 
        Education should not just be theoretical but practical also to promote the wholesome development of children. 


        The education system of the city is inspired by Finland and partially from The United States of America. Basic education starts at the age of seven, and instead of dividing it into elementary and junior high, it offers single-structure education for nine years. 
        Teaching is done by using participative measures by giving students projects and involving them in various activities for better learning of the subject.
Sustainable schools are the teaching tool that bring together environmental education and community engagement. 
These collaborative activities inspire all members of the school community, which creates a culture of continuous learning, growth, and development
solution_benefits: The solution offered is distinctive in its approach . It focuses on the overall growth of individual incorporating sustainability as a key feature in teh minds of coming generation , in addition with values , harmony and the ability to blend with the existing circumstances .
why_best_equipped: This is because I am myself a part of the future generation which are yet to flourish their ideas , enrich their thoughts . So with this I would like to mention that recently I had been a part of An international project which was based on reforming the educational systems  to create an educated world . The Project "GRUEN: Green Urban Environments" is a Jean Monnet Project of Hong Kong Baptist University in Hong Kong SAR, co-funded by the Erasmus+ Programme of the European Union. I feel that events , programs like ENpower are vital to encourage the young minds like us to express themselves on a wider platform and to the world ..

title: Copying or Cheating During online exams.
problem_definition: Copying or Cheating During online exams.
problem_description: Due to the current pandemic situation, we have gone through a major transformation in the field of education. Online lectures and online exams are being conducted regularly although, one of the major problems is copying and cheating during online exams. Copying during exams has always been a common concern and a concern that requires immediate action. After the digital transformation, it has now become easier and un-complicated to cheat. Many students, with the help of advanced technologies, copy in order to score more marks and better grades.
target_user_group: My idea benefits both the students and the teachers. Teachers play a significant role in a students’ life. They support, guide and moreover help the student become successful. I believe that it is important for the teachers to know who’s copying so that they can help the students overcome the fear of failure and motivate the students who lack confidence.
problem_urgency: As Jose Rizal rightly quoted "The youth is the hope of our future" which means that the youth, if given proper education and knowledge, can run the world. Examinations are conducted to asses a students' performance which is very important so that the school and teachers can help the students. It is important to pass a right judgement but if the student copies or cheats, there is a chance that the student will be misjudged. Copying or cheating is also not fair for the students who are dedicated and sincere.
solution: I came up with a solution that can help solve this problem. Many schools use video conferencing apps so my idea states that the school/teachers create an app or apply a feature by which teacher can see all the students but the students can only see the teacher. Once this feature is applied or app is installed, then they can ask the students to sit facing the wall, only for the exam borrow another device and log in through both and place one device in a way that both the student and the screen where he is writing his paper is seen. (More information in PPT that is attached below)
solution_benefits: Once this feature is applied and all the above steps are followed, the teacher or examiner will be able to see what each student is doing and will be able to identify the students who are copying or cheating. Firstly, this will help the teachers and the school identify the people who are copying so that they can help them. Also, the students will not tend to copy because of the fear of getting caught and will start working hard. Moreover, the students will pay attention during the class and take studies more seriously.
why_best_equipped: Thomas Jefferson rightly said, “Honesty is the first chapter in the book of wisdom”, and I totally agree with him. I have never copied and neither have I ever cheated in anything. I think its better to accept failure as failure is the stepping stone for success. I strongly believe that copying hampers our progress and development. I think I am best equipped because I want to help not only the teachers but also the students who have got the habit of copying.

title: In this current situation, where the only possible way of education without
problem_definition: In this current situation, where the only possible way of education without physical contact or the risk of covid-19, is online learning or E-Learning. But due to this online mode of education many poor children have to face several problems. One of the main problem which they face is to afford the expensive smartphones and laptops. The children who belong to very poor families can't even afford the second-hand ones. Another problem is the technical issues. It happens many times in the online learning that children face poor video and sound quality and keep getting disconnected regularly. Also, many children interrupt their classes and help in household works like to go far away to fetch clean water which is unavailable in their dirty areas. The poor children are facing a lot of problem especially in education field and we must find a solution of this problem as it's a very critical problem and needs a solution.
problem_description: As we all know how important education is, and because of this pandemic many poor children are unable to concentrate on their studies. As I already mentioned, it is very difficult for the economically backwards families to afford the expensive smartphones and laptops to attend the online classes. Even if the children afford the required materials like smartphones or laptops, they often face several technical issues like regularly getting disconnected, poor audio and video quality as they live in a low network area. One more problem faced by them is that children who really want and are interested in studies, get distracted and disturbed due to regular disconnecting. As we know it's a very critical problem, it definitely needs a solution.
target_user_group: Here in this case, we are trying to solve the problems of poor children which they are facing in this hard pandemic time. Education is important for all and during such hard time, especially underprivileged children are facing a lot of problem. There are many unprivileged children who want to study but can’t due to financial crunches and other family issues. Every child has the right to education even the poor ones, just like the RTE act launched by government in 2009 mentioned. It describes that the children between the age of 6-14 in India, irrespective of their economic or caste background.
problem_urgency: As we explained now that education is very important for everyone and all of us equally deserve to get education. Education is not meant for the rich students, it is important for all. Through education only we can get nice jobs and can earn money and education is considered a really important field. Because it’s so important and it is the one who affects our future, we should try to resolve the problem faced by the poor families in their education field the best we can. This problem faced by the poor students is really critical and needs a proper solution.
solution: We can divide ourselves in small groups and choose one area. In the area we chose, we can teach the children, following all the safety norms of covid-19. We can even request our teachers to support us and teach the students free of cost. We can make a social helping group in which we will try to donate some money to these children for their education. We can try to encourage people to donate some money, their old tabs or their some of the stationaries if they can. If government and others will support we can definitely help hundreds of such unprivileged children. We students along with our teacher’s support can teach them and donate them stationaries like notebooks, pencils, etc. It will not only help them in this period, but if people keep supporting we can even help them after this pandemic. This donation and education will even help them after the pandemic. If we get some support from government or even from other people, this will definitely help a lot of students and will reduce their struggle and pain.
solution_benefits: These measures will create a process in which those unprivileged children would be helped and with our support along with the government, they will provide the country with a good future. Also illiteracy is one of the dimensions of the poverty and with this solution there would be reduction in the poverty ratio in our country. There are many students who want to study but can’t due to poverty but with these measures they can get all their essentials and can lead a successful future. The products provided will be sanitized and tested for Covid-19, so there is no chance or risk of Covid-19. With this solution the poor students can get all their study materials free of cost and can study. This will not only help them during corona virus but if there is still support, this money can still be used by them to buys stationary for regular classes, books and etc.
why_best_equipped: We, as students, can certainly request our school authority to help us in this humanitarian act. In social media sites, watching these things other people may also start these measures in their cities and towns. Gradually the number of people will increase who will carry on this work and as much as they can and will help the poor to be literate. We as students can understand their feelings and how it feels to be illiterate. So we will try our best to help them in this hard time by teaching them along with teacher’s and other’s support.  If the necessary support by all of us is provided, it will definitely help those unprivileged children a lot.  It will reduce the struggle and pain amongst the poor students and can change many lives. It will improve their future and will help them a lot. So as we got a chance to present our views and the solution provided has many advantages without covid-19 risk, we think we are the best equipped to offer this solution.

title: “Education is what remains after one has forgotten what one has learned in
problem_definition:
“Education is what remains after one has forgotten what one has learned in school.” - Albert Einstein.

Our present education system focuses more on memorising facts and gaining marks rather than enabling the students to understand the the concept in a deeper and clear way. 
Teachers are so busy on concentrating that whether they will finish the syllabus on time or not which leads them to compromise on the students well understanding of the subject being taught. 
This constrains the students mindset and compel them to rote learn the concepts. 

Our education system also refrains students to choose certain streams with specific subjects and hence not do they have the choice or freedom to choose their combination of subjects which they would like to learn.
problem_description:
Learning is more than memorising facts , learning is understanding it and being to explain it in your own words.

Students are so busy running behind grades and marks that they have lost the zeal to understand why a particular thing is happing and how? 
Marks are not a cumulative parameter to judge a student’s competency and knowledge, but our schools fail to understand that.. 

The whole world has faced a pandemic , lakhs of people have lost their lives, there is global economic loss of billions and more than half of the school and college students were happy they educational institutions were closed . 
This shows how well are education system treats it’s students!
target_user_group: The user group whose problem we are attempting to solve are the school/college students
problem_urgency:
This problem is critical and needs an urgent solution since if now now when?
We have to make a change so that students learn to question their curiousity and learn things in a more creative way rather than mugging up facts. 
Most teachers and parents believe that students thrive under pressure. However, in most cases, they crack under pressure. The burden of living up to unnecessarily high expectations takes a toll on the mental health of the students.
Exposing the students to learn in a healthy environment of Learning in a fun way would not only give them better understanding of things but also  prepare for the world and it’s challenges.
solution:
Solution - 
1. Transform the way of teaching- 
Involving various activities to teach certain concepts for deeper understanding instead of just copying it down in notebooks, 
making students experience what they are learning by including them in real life situations .
2. Introducing new subjects without exams such as current affairs, general knowledge on entertainment, sports etc , giving basic like skills on adulting on how to pay taxes, even to the science or Arts students.
This will keep students informed of what is happening around them and in the world so that they develop a wide perspective with critical solutions to face various problems and cable needs of the world
solution_benefits:
Our solution gives a distinct solution to the users as it enables them prepare for the real world and not only for the exams.
With risking competition around us it is important for the students to understand what is being taught and Learn it will sheer interest to develope a rationalised thought and also shape their personality.
why_best_equipped:
We are better equipped to offer This solution since we have experienced it and also have such a privilege to speak up on a platform which encourages us to talk and share our ideas on education system transformation 
We can also speak on behalf of the students who are not confident enough to talk about this and provide them an opportunity to enter an education system where they enjoy and love learning

title: Online education is not much impactful for children and create lot of
problem_definition: Online education is not much impactful for children and create lot of pain-points for teachers. There is a need to explore opportunities to integrate online & offline education and balance reach & relatability of education.
problem_description: We always felt need of a platform or a device which can the serve the sole purpose of online education as students of school going age group get a lot of material online such as you-tube videos, social networking sites and other plethora of things to turn their attention to. There should be medium which can replicate the real classroom learning without much distractions. There is also a need to put a full stop on googling or browsing everything whenever students are presented with a problem as this is leading towards stopping the process of creative thinking and problem solving. There is also a need to create a low-cost device to enable the masses, to reap the benefits of online education.
target_user_group: Our idea can apply to any age group who aspires for online education, such as school going children, university students, teachers and any person who wishes to become a part of online education medium, but it applies especially to the age group of school going children, ie. 3-18 years old and their teachers.
problem_urgency:
The problem is critical due to the following reasons:-
1.	There is an urgent need to save our children from the limitations of being online such as social networking sites and other online content, which is not good for them.
2.	To limit the usage of internet in case of each and every problem and to let children think on their own and creatively.
3.	To enable poor students to reap the benefits of online education.
solution: Our solution presents a be-spoke application which will run as a device or as a stand-alone application having features of real classroom learning. This single application will ensure the elimination of the distractions which has continued to be the cause of worry amongst parents and educators. This application will ensure a low-cost solution so taken by minimizing the hardware requirements and will act as a one-stop shop solution. This device would not only serve in the pandemic situations but also in normal times, whenever students are not present in the classroom.
solution_benefits:
Our solution gives distinct benefits or reduce their pain as:-
1.	The device would be 10-12 inch tab which would have features to cater to the needs of online mode of learning.
2.	It will serve the sole purpose of online learning with no distractions.
3.	It will have reasonable price to ensure its reaches to the masses and our will be free of cost.
4.	It will have wi-fi connectivity and USB ports. It will have firewalls to protect virus attacks and will have a Bluetooth connected pen-tab.
5.	It will have basic features of Ms. Office, video conferencing, message and email service and remote learning platforms.
6.	It will use cloud storage to physically store the data and make it available online to users. 
7.	How this device can overcome the pain points of teachers? – The device will have special features for marking attendance like automatic attendance tabular which will record the attendance.
why_best_equipped: As a student of class 9 studying through online medium of education has made me suffer the drawbacks and limitations such as spending a lot of screen time on the unnecessary content and social networking sites. We have seen our parents going through pain due to lot of anxiety and fear of seeing us spending our precious time in such things. They fear that their children are crossing the thin line between what is required and what is not. This realization has made us analyze the shortcomings of online mode of education which gave birth to this idea of a device which caters solely to online education. I have also observed my mother, who is a government school teacher, getting worried about the future of her school children, whose family cannot afford laptops or smart phones for each and every child. The concern for both the issues mentioned above, make us all the more equipped to offer such an idea.

title: Lack of Vocational training in School: India has 47 million youth of secondary
problem_definition: Lack of Vocational training in School: India has 47 million youth of secondary and higher secondary school-going age dropping out of school, according to a report by the Montreal-based UNESCO Institute for Statistics and Global Education Monitoring. These dropouts have only memorized few things that they have learnt in their school curriculum. I am afraid that they have hardly learnt anything in schools which is going to help them in earning their livelihood. As per Professor David Perkins, 98% of things are never really utilized in a student’s life! Most of the things that are taught don’t help in the student’s profession.
problem_description: Studies show that only 25.8% of students go to colleges. We believe poverty and unemployment can be eradicated by good education. If a person gets a good education, they get a job and thus prosper. Therefore, getting proper education is a must for a developing nation. Hence we need to impart vocational training in schools which will help them in their lives. Even meager strong communication skills in English and elementary behavioral training is going to land them a decently paying job in BPOs/Call centres and Great Indian Retail Industry.
target_user_group: We are trying to help the Lower and Lower middle class students. As they are the future of India.
problem_urgency: We believe this problem is critical as education is very important for a developing country and most of the Indians are literate but poor. We believe that the education policies are to blame since our system produces Implementers and Executioners rather than being entrepreneurs. Those people who have got success in life also doesn’t know how to invest their money and grow it for future security
solution: We believe that giving each student personalized vocational training in their preferred field after basic education (i.e. 10th grade) would prepare students to master their fields. Thus, not becoming ‘jacks of all but masters of none’  but, ‘masters of one’. Also recommended additions is to “Entrepreneurship” and “Personal Finance” which will help students to generate employment on their own as well as be prudent with their financial health in future.
solution_benefits: We believe that this would help student master one specific filed which is going to help them earn their livelihood thus also reducing unemployment in India. Thus helping India in becoming an economic super power.
why_best_equipped: We think we are best equipped to offer a solution to this critical situation as we are students ourselves and understand the needs of fellow students. Most of the times, the people who identify the problem are best capable to solve it too.

title: One of the major limitations of the Indian education system comprising of
problem_definition: One of the major limitations of the Indian education system comprising of boards such as CBSE, ICSE, state boards, etc., is the lack of emphasis on extracurricular activities of students, specially in the online class format. Academically, students have the knowledge and skills required but they are not provided the guidance that they require by the education system at an early age to identify their interests and implement those skills in activities that they are passionate about. Extracurricular activities have a major role in university application abroad as well as in one’s personal growth, but the prevalent education system in India lacks the ability to provide guidance required by the students to identify their passion by first exploring their interests in middle and high school. This acts as a major hurdle for student as when they grow up, they lack important skills like leadership qualities, management skills and also humanitarian beliefs that are important in their corporate life and can only develop through extracurricular activities.
problem_description: The problem lies in the schooling system of this nation comprising of Indian boards that shed complete emphasis on academics and do not even consider extracurriculars as an integral part of their education. This results in teachers as well as parents to promote children to focus only on academics and not on exploring their passion. This leads to students having no guidance or influence to identify their passion and develop important skills required in this era. This particular issue gets amplified in the current pandemic and lockdown situation where Indian students now have even less choices and influence, due to lack of interaction and pandemic restrictions, to take on extracurriculars of their interests, thus leaving students no option but to waste their time in the assumption of having no activities to perform.
target_user_group: The ‘user’ group that is most affected by this problem are the students themselves as their personal growth is being stalled due to lack of emphasis on extracurricular activities in their life. So, I am attempting to solve the problem of students, specifically the ones belonging to the age group of 11-17 yrs as this period in one’s life is of utmost importance as our activities in this period define our personality and our qualities that is going to benefit them in the rest of their life.
problem_urgency: This current era consists of immense competition from the western society in the corporate world and with changing times and changing practices of delivering education, it has become important than ever before to promote students to pursue their passion and be more active so that they have the ability and the required skills to effectively deal with such competition in the future.  Thus, this problem needs to be dealt with instantly and more rigorously in such crucial times so that student’s quality of life in the future is not compromised due to this pandemic.
solution: An app that will at first register the details of the student as in the standard, school or college board, age, etc., then the app will evaluate the user’s interest based on a series of MCQs, the options would be based on topics such as literature, humanitarian beliefs, sports, culinary arts, social media, etc. based on the answers chosen by the user, the algorithm will shortlist the top 5 area of interest of the user and based on that it will suggest activities that the user can do in those fields with certain resources attached that will guide the user on how/where to perform those respective tasks. For instance, it will suggest the user a list of NGOs if one of its top area of interest is humanitarian beliefs. The app would also consider the current pandemic situation and provide activities that the user can do while staying at home based on the user’s interests with resources that would guide the user on how to do it.
solution_benefits: The Indian education system fails to effectively guide students to explore their interests and passion, thus it is critically important for a third-party solution that will fill this gap and provide the resources required by the students and help them identify their interest and start developing it at an early age. It is rightly said, “Lack of direction, not lack of time, is the problem. We all have twenty-four-hour days.” With the help of my idea, students would have the direction that they require to build on their interests, and thus this app would significantly benefit the users as it will promote them to develop skills that will definitely help them to be better entrepreneurs, employees, etc., in the future. Further, this idea will also benefit students in this pandemic situation as it will help them to use their free time effectively in activities that they can pursue safely, and overall, this idea will eliminate confusion and stress by providing direction and guidance.
why_best_equipped: Being a student myself, I have experienced the Indian education system, to be specific- CBSE, in my middle school from 7th grade to 10th grade (before 7th I was in IGCSE). And now studying in the IB diploma program (11th grade), I can easily identify the difference between Indian and international curriculums as IB considers extracurriculars an important part of its education system and thus promotes and guides its students to explore their interests, unlike Indian boards. And I have lived this difference as now I can see the impact extracurriculars can have on one’s personality, plus in the beginning I was confused a lot about what activities to do mainly because of the lockdown situation which limited interaction, this led to a phase of confusion for me and my peers as the choices of extracurricular activities were limited. By directly experiencing these problems and understanding its magnitude I decided to propose this idea to help other students with similar problems.

solution_benefits: This app could further be taken by local people or common people living in India like us. They could also post their left over food in that app which could also be taken by nearby NGO .
why_best_equipped: I and my educated family could make this app and give it to the NGO's and resturants and nearby people.

title:
The precise Problems:
1.	The case of losing the handwritten notebooks, files
problem_definition:
The precise Problems:
1.	The case of losing the handwritten notebooks, files and other Study material 
2.	The limitations of present online teaching platforms 
3.	The need to Be physically present in the campus for best mental and physical training
problem_description:
School/College/ Coaching institute Students face problem in carrying heavy schoolbags with notebooks and textbooks to the school.
1.)	Students invest lot of their time in maintaining their handwritten  notebooks and practical files for school.
2.)	Teachers also experience strain on having to manually review and correct those many handwritten notebooks and files prepared by students.
3.)	After all this effort by students and teachers, the handwritten notebooks and files are always prone to be damaged/lost, washing away the efforts that were put in. 
----The limitations of present online teaching platforms :
1.)	The most commonly used platforms for online classes  like Google meet and Zoom are limited to lack of Real-time interaction between Teachers and Students.
2.)	The study material , virtually shared by the teacher is always prone to being deleted and lost from a device.
target_user_group: The user group : the user group we’ll aim at will be all educational institutes such as Schools, Colleges coaching institutes and skill training institutes.
problem_urgency: Yes, The problem is critical and needs urgent solution because a safe, secure  and reliable study material is necessary for proper theoretical knowledge of a student.
solution:
The solution lies in developing a dedicated education software and hardware, while keeping these points in consideration:
1.	Instead of using paper and pen, a student has to simply utilize the concept of digital documentation to prepare the notebooks and practical files.
2.	In place of an inkpen, the student will use a stylus pen to pen things down. 
3.	The software that we will provide will receive inputs from the stylus pen and maintain a digital notebook for different subjects with an index page at the beginning. The index page will have a table of contents with hyperlink for each chapter, topic and subtopic that the student can edit accordingly.
4.	All this task will be made possible on a smartphone / tablet that the student will for sure have with himself. The institute that the student has enrolled in, will have to embed our dedicated education software. 
5.	Once inside the institution campus, the devices can be connected to the server network and this will allow the institute to monitor the activities of the students.
6.	Once the students complete their classwork/homework/assignment/notes, they can submit them on the same software to their teachers, who can review the work of the students.
7.	All these files will always be saved on several server storages, to prevent loss of information.
solution_benefits: With the solution that we’ll provide, the students won’t need to carry bulky schoolbags with loads of notebooks/textbooks. They will carry all their info in a single device. Moreover, no tension of losing the notebooks and other study material.
why_best_equipped: I have firm belief that we are the best equipped to offer this solution as this solution will not require any futuristic technology like AR/VR that is not possible right now. The solution we are offering is all possible just by optimizing, specializing and organizing the technology present with us today. Moreover, being a student myself, I know the bitter facts about the flaws in our education system and the possibilities of fixing them too.

title: As part of this exercise, I have interviewed couple of stakeholders like
problem_definition:
As part of this exercise, I have interviewed couple of stakeholders like students; Parents and Teachers and captured challenges they are facing but one thing resonated with me couple of months back :
Affordability of education to everyone and at a very reasonable cost

As part of this exercise, I would like to address this problem and see how education can be availed by all(specially low income sector) during this pandemic situation.
As Nelson Mandela suggests -- It is not beyond our power to create a world in which all children have to a good education. 
I feel everyone has equal right for education...
problem_description:
-- Education should be affordable to all. 
-- In the current situation only a privileged few can afford the additional costs of a computer and high speed Internet. 
-- Teach under-privileged students who cannot incur additional cost for education.
target_user_group:
-- Address educational needs of both rural and urban students. 
--All genders from the age of 10 to 17.
-- Many of them have both economical and financial challenges. The household income is less than 2.5 lakhs per year.
-- Government, Society, Parents, Students, Teachers, Educational Boards, Schools, NGOs
problem_urgency:
-- Many in India attend either government or subsidized schools where tuition is free or very minimal.
-- Most of the students who go to these schools come from lower income groups, a vast majority of students belong to this category.
-- The education has to be a continuous process and one year of break is too costly for students.
-- It is important for the students to complete the current academic year and not have a backlog. we want to ensure the teachers take the responsibility for this.
-- Students are future of any Country -- Country's progress in various aspects like economy culture etc.. are dependent on next generation and how they are groomed. Education is very critical, which would enable them to acquire the skills to transform as leaders.
solution:
Create a platform where revenue can be generated and funds can be raised to help the parents and students who cannot afford digital devices.
-- Revenue can be generated from sponsors; advertisements etc.
-- Funds can be raised by organizing charity events 
-- Funds can also be raised by donations from the people/organizations who are willing to help.
-- The revenue generated can help government schools and parents to buy systems for their kids enabling them to conduct/attend virtual classes.
-- Apart from this, students (or anyone) can nominate to donate time and expertise – by teaching or training other students/ teachers on any topic of interest. This will help them to realize the value of education and be motivated themselves.
solution_benefits:
The solution I propose has multiple benefits :
It  addresses the financial challenge which economically backward families or schools are facing and enable them to equal right to education irrespective of financial status. 
It also helps students to be motivated and engaged. In my personal opinion students concentrate more when they have to learn to teach others.  we are teaching to students from various backgrounds and of different caliber. 
Let’s take an example , I’m a student of 9th grade and studying the following subjects: Math, English, Social  Science and languages. I have been given a task of teaching five of my fellow 9th grades who are underprivileged. It now becomes my responsibility to learn about French Revolution more thoroughly in order to teach  these five students who will be taught remotely or in-person. 
 Learning in groups has many benefits in these times. Children go through a lot of psychological imbalances and giving them solutions to their study issues or concerns can calm them down. They can express their opinions more freely and this creates an atmosphere for learning.
why_best_equipped:
I am one of the key stakeholder of educational system  - who has been greatly impacted with pandemic situation and suddenly the world around me has changed. 
I love to be at school and meeting my friends, spending time with them and taking part in extra circular activities -- I love basketball. Pandemic situation has impacted me, not able to take part of any matches. And sometimes I have to spend hours on front of system, not having f2f interaction with any of family members as they are occupied with their own activities. 
But later I have realized, I am privileged compared to other children around me - when I learnt from my maid that her daughter is not able to continue her school as she cannot afford getting her system neither school has provision to conduct virtual classes.  Since then I have been thinking on how can I help and conducted few small events to raise funding. As part of this exercise, I have expressed my thoughts -- hopefully, I can make difference someday.

title: Those were wise words, but from what I have observed, most organizations don’t
problem_definition: Those were wise words, but from what I have observed, most organizations don’t heed them when tackling innovation projects. Indeed, when developing new products, processes, or even businesses, most companies aren’t sufficiently rigorous in defining the problems they’re attempting to solve and articulating why those issues are important.
problem_description: solving problems is a common activity in every business. In some areas, such as Quality, it receives special treatment with root cause identification methods and corrective actions. However, we often do not give due attention to an important step in the problem solving process: the formulation of an adequate description.
target_user_group: Problem solving and decision making belong together. You cannot solve a problem without making a decision. There are two main types of decision makers. Some people use a systematic, rational approach. Others are more intuitive. They go with their emotions or a gut feeling about the right approach. They may have highly creative ways to address the problem, but cannot explain why they have chosen this approach.
problem_urgency: Every Problem can be solved, you just have to learn how to solve it. There is a Process to Problem Solving, but you also need skills, knowledge and information in order to be a good problem solver. Problem Solving Skills are the most important skills to have.
solution: my solution is that the people should tell the problems.
solution_benefits: Personal values are desirable to an individual and represent what is important to someone. The same value in different people can elicit different behaviours, eg if someone values success one person may work very hard to gain success in their career whereas someone else may take advantage of others to climb the career ladder.
why_best_equipped: because i participate in this competition.

title: The main concern for the present day individual is that they spend more time
problem_definition: The main concern for the present day individual is that they spend more time thinking anxiously about what created the problem in the first place than to think 'How do I rectify it'
problem_description: The main problem is getting to a solution efficiently, since more often or not, the problem needs to be solved in a finite time with impressive results.
target_user_group: The 'user' group would be teenagers and adults alike. They are the ones who are always worried about something.
problem_urgency: People do not know how to approach to a solution in an efficient way. They more often or not be anxious about reaching the final destination in a single step. The primary concern that this idea deals with is coming up with a solution.
solution: The main step is to STEP OUTSIDE. It can be as simple as going for a walk, cycling at dawn, practicing yoga in the open, or walking barefoot on grass. Gazing at green trees in the sunshine with birds chirping - the feeling would fill anybody with elation and contentment. The point is - being one with nature, at least for a moment. It helps an individual get away from distractions and allows the mind to focus on solutions more efficiently and in an immersive manner. Ideas to rectify any issue will come automatically. The individual who has the problem is the one who knows it in great detail, and is the one who can solve it accordingly. Thus, stepping outside is an efficient way of searching for new ideas and is an ingenious way of having a different outlook regarding any problem.
solution_benefits: Solutions to problems can be easy to discern. The most simple things, that are true to the foundation, are the most effective. This idea is a beautiful example of that. A moment apart, allows the user's mind to relax and rejuvenate, while at the same time come up with solutions to their problems and even new ideas meanwhile.
why_best_equipped:
I can most definitely say that almost everyone has at least once in their lifetime gone through such a simple way of getting new ideas and a different outlook without consciously knowing about it.
This is one of those practices that a selected people use to get new ideas.
